instruction:
The sum of the series $\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty }{(-1)^{n}\frac{n+1}{(2n+1)!}}$ is ( )

Options:
A. ${\frac{1}{2}}$(sin1+cos1)
B. ${\frac{1}{2}}$(cos1+2sin1)
C. ${\frac{1}{2}}$(cos1-2sin1)
D. ${ rac{1}{2}}$(cos1-sin1)
E. ${\frac{1}{2}}$(cos1+sin1)
F. ${\frac{1}{2}}$(2cos1-sin1)
G. ${\frac{1}{2}}$(2cos1+sin1)
H. ${ rac{1}{2}}$(-sin1-cos1)
I. ${\frac{1}{2}}$(cos1-sin1)
J. ${ rac{1}{2}}$(sin1-cos1)
